title: Uitgeverij M
content:
{{Top|rwc}}
'''Uitgeverij M''' is the science-fiction, fantasy, and thriller imprint of De Boekerij. It currently is responsible for the translation and distribution of ''[[Star Wars]]'' novels in the [[Wikipedia:Netherlands|Netherlands]]. Uitgeverij M was formed when the crime, science-fiction, and fantasy sections of [[J. M. Meulenhoff]] joined with the science-fiction and fantasy section of Het Spectrum.
